en.title: Best Soundbars of 2026: Samsung HW-Q990F vs Sonos Arc Ultra vs Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 Ranked
en.description: The definitive 2026 soundbar ranking, from the all-conquering 11.1.4 Samsung HW-Q990F to the budget Atmos of the Yamaha SR-B40A.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳家庭劇院 Soundbar 排行榜：Samsung HW-Q990F、Sonos Arc Ultra、Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 2026 年 Soundbar 完整排名，從 11.1.4 聲道全包的 Samsung HW-Q990F 到平價 Atmos 的 Yamaha SR-B40A，幫你配對最對味的那一支。

en.description: An 11.1.4-channel package with 23 drivers across the bar, subwoofer, and wireless rears, delivering the most complete surround envelope you can buy in one box.

zh-tw.description: 11.1.4 聲道一次給滿，主機加重低音加無線後環繞共 23 顆單體，是一次買齊就能把整個客廳包起來的最完整方案。

en.description: A single bar that throws a huge, room-filling front stage and slots straight into the Sonos multi-room ecosystem, with the cleanest music playback of any soundbar here.

zh-tw.description: 單支聲霸就能撐出寬到誇張的前方音場，直接接進 Sonos 多房音響生態，純聽音樂的細膩度是這份榜單裡最強的。

en.description: Sony's 13-driver flagship uses 360 Spatial Sound Mapping to paint height and surround cues into the air, giving the most open, cinematic stage of any standalone bar.

zh-tw.description: Sony 旗艦 13 單體，靠 360 度空間音場映射把高度與環繞訊息畫在空氣裡，單支聲霸能撐出最開闊、最像電影院的音場。

en.description: A 9.1.5-channel system with 17 speakers and a unique up-firing center channel that lifts dialogue into the same height plane as the effects.

zh-tw.description: 9.1.5 聲道、17 顆單體，獨家的向上發聲中央聲道把對白拉到跟特效同一個高度層，是聲道數最多的家用套裝。

en.description: A 5.1.2-channel bundle with subwoofer and wireless rears that delivers true physical surround for well under a thousand dollars, the value pick of 2026.

zh-tw.description: 5.1.2 聲道含重低音與無線後環繞，不到三萬就能拿到真正有實體後喇叭的環繞，是 2026 年最划算的全套首選。

en.description: A single bar with nine drivers, two up-firing, plus AI Dialogue Mode and ADAPTiQ room calibration that make voices sit cleanly above the action.

zh-tw.description: 單支九單體含兩顆向上發聲，搭配 AI 對白模式與 ADAPTiQ 空間校正，把人聲穩穩托在動作場面之上，看劇對白超清楚。

en.description: The compact Atmos bar that owns small and medium rooms, with the same Sonos app, multi-room support, and HDMI eARC as its bigger siblings.

zh-tw.description: 主攻中小空間的緊湊 Atmos 聲霸，跟旗艦一樣的 Sonos App、多房連動與 HDMI eARC，租屋套房客廳放這支剛剛好。

en.description: An 18-speaker 5.1.4 system whose end speakers physically rotate skyward when Atmos or DTS:X is detected, then face forward for stereo music.

zh-tw.description: 18 單體 5.1.4 系統，偵測到 Atmos 或 DTS:X 時兩端喇叭會實體轉向天花板，放音樂時再轉回正面，這個機構設計到現在還是很有梗。

en.description: Sonos' entry bar for bedrooms and offices, with a tidy footprint and full app and multi-room support, priced to be a first Sonos purchase.

zh-tw.description: Sonos 入門款，體積小巧，適合臥室或書房，App 與多房連動全都有，是踏進 Sonos 生態最沒壓力的第一步。

en.description: A 2.1 bar with wireless subwoofer and virtual Dolby Atmos plus Yamaha's Clear Voice, putting Atmos branding into the rare sub-$400 tier.

zh-tw.description: 2.1 聲道含無線重低音，支援虛擬 Dolby Atmos 加上 Yamaha 的 Clear Voice 人聲增強，把 Atmos 拉進少見的萬元以下價位。

en.description: A 5.1.2 single-bar that delivers reference-grade Hi-Fi sound and cinematic Atmos with no separate subwoofer needed.

zh-tw.description: KEF 把發燒級 HiFi 喇叭技術塞進一根 5.1.2 聲霸，不用外接重低音就有電影院級的 Atmos 表現，定位給追求音質的人。

references.title: Samsung HW-Q990F vs Sonos Arc Ultra: which Dolby Atmos soundbar should you buy?
Sonos Arc Ultra vs Samsung HW-Q990F
Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 review: Sony's new flagship Dolby Atmos soundbar surpasses expectations
LG S95TR review
Samsung QS750F review
Bose Smart Ultra Soundbar Review

en.commentary: I have spent 2026 living with these bars, and the verdict at the top is clear: the Samsung HW-Q990F wins because it gives you the whole cinema in one carton. Eleven main channels, a real subwoofer, and wireless rear speakers mean the surround effects come from behind you where they belong, and that physical placement does what no amount of virtual processing can fake. The Sonos Arc Ultra is my pick for anyone who wants one elegant bar and the best music playback on this list, and it earns second place on the strength of its front stage and the Sonos ecosystem alone. Sony's Bravia Theatre Bar 9 takes third because its 360 Spatial Sound Mapping conjures the most open, cinematic image of any single bar, and it stays composed at volume. Below them the list sorts cleanly by what you need: the LG S95TR for sheer channel count, the Samsung QS750F for the most surround per dollar, the Bose Smart Ultra for dialogue clarity, and the Sonos Beam Gen 2 for rooms where a full rig would be overkill. The Vizio Elevate, Sonos Ray, and Yamaha SR-B40A round things out for design, ecosystem entry, and budget Atmos respectively. Buy the Q990F if you have the space and the budget. Everyone else has a clean answer further down.

highlights.title: The Samsung HW-Q990F wins because physical rears beat any virtual trick
highlights.body: I keep coming back to placement. The Q990F ships with wireless rear speakers and a dedicated subwoofer, so a helicopter crossing behind your sofa actually originates behind your sofa. Every standalone bar on this list, however clever its processing, is guessing at that position. With 11.1.4 channels and 23 drivers the Q990F also resolves fine detail better than the Arc Ultra, picking out backing vocals and brushed cymbals that lesser systems smear together. At around two thousand dollars it costs the most, and it earns it.

highlights.title: The Sonos Arc Ultra is the music lover's soundbar
highlights.body: If you play as much music as film through your bar, the Arc Ultra is the one I recommend. It produces the cleanest, most natural stereo image here, with genuine weight to its low end for a single enclosure. Drop it into a Sonos system and you get whole-home audio, AirPlay, and an app that stays out of your way. At $999 it undercuts the Sony flagship while delivering the front stage that matters most for a one-bar setup.

highlights.title: Sony's Bravia Theatre Bar 9 paints the most open cinematic stage
highlights.body: Sony's 360 Spatial Sound Mapping uses phantom speakers to stretch the image well beyond the physical bar, and the effect is genuinely convincing on Atmos mixes. Thirteen drivers including dedicated beam tweeters give it height cues that float rather than point. It costs $1,399 before you add the optional subwoofer and rears, so it sits below the all-in-one Samsung on value, but for an open, room-filling sound from one bar it is the most cinematic option I tested.

highlights.title: The Samsung QS750F is the value champion of 2026
highlights.body: For $899 the QS750F gives you a 5.1.2 bar, a compact eight-inch subwoofer, and two wireless rear speakers. That is real, physical surround at a price where most rivals sell you a bar alone. It frequently drops to around $650, at which point nothing else with rear speakers comes close. If your budget stops short of four figures and you still want effects behind you, this is the bar to buy.

highlights.title: Match the bar to the room, not the spec sheet
highlights.body: The biggest mistake I see is buying more soundbar than the room can use. The Sonos Beam Gen 2 sounds fuller than a full rig in a small apartment living room, and the Yamaha SR-B40A puts virtual Atmos and a wireless sub into a bedroom for under $400. The Sonos Ray is the cleanest first step into the Sonos world at $279. Spend the flagship money only when you have a sofa with space behind it.

zh-tw.commentary: 2026 年這幾支聲霸我都實際擺在客廳用過一輪，榜首結論很乾脆：Samsung HW-Q990F 之所以贏，是因為它一箱就把整套電影院給你。11 個主聲道、一顆真正的重低音、再加無線後環繞，環繞音效會從你背後傳來，這種實體擺位是再強的虛擬運算都模擬不出來的。Sonos Arc Ultra 是我給「只想要一支漂亮聲霸、又最在意聽音樂」的人的首選，光靠前方音場和 Sonos 生態就坐穩第二。Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 排第三，它的 360 度空間音場映射撐出單支聲霸裡最開闊、最像電影院的畫面，開大聲也穩得住。再往下這份榜就照需求排得很清楚：要聲道數最多選 LG S95TR，要每塊錢買到最多環繞選 Samsung QS750F，看劇在意對白選 Bose Smart Ultra，空間不大選 Sonos Beam Gen 2。Vizio Elevate、Sonos Ray、Yamaha SR-B40A 分別補上機構設計、生態入門和平價 Atmos 三塊。坦白說，空間和預算都夠就直接上 Q990F，其他人往下看都有對味的答案。

highlights.title: Samsung HW-Q990F 贏在實體後喇叭，虛擬技術再強也比不過
highlights.body: 我一直回到「擺位」這件事。Q990F 直接附無線後環繞和獨立重低音，所以一架直升機從沙發後面飛過時，聲音真的是從你沙發後面出來的。榜上每一支單體聲霸，運算再聰明也只是在猜那個位置。加上 11.1.4 聲道、23 顆單體，Q990F 連細節解析都比 Arc Ultra 更利，背景和聲、刷過的鈸聲都拆得開，這些在比較弱的系統上會糊成一團。它要價約六萬是榜上最貴，但這個錢花得有道理。

highlights.title: Sonos Arc Ultra 是愛聽音樂的人該選的那支
highlights.body: 如果你用聲霸聽音樂的時間跟看電影一樣多，我推 Arc Ultra。它的立體聲音場是這份榜單裡最乾淨、最自然的，單一機身能給到這種低頻量感很不容易。接進 Sonos 系統就有全屋音響、AirPlay，App 也很安分不亂跳。NT$41,900 的定價比 Sony 旗艦便宜，又把單支聲霸最關鍵的前方音場做到位。

highlights.title: Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 撐出最開闊的電影院音場
highlights.body: Sony 的 360 度空間音場映射用虛擬喇叭把畫面拉到遠超過機身本體的範圍，放 Atmos 片源時這個效果真的會騙到耳朵。13 顆單體含專屬波束高音，高度音效是飄在空中而不是死死指向某一點。它台灣售價 NT$42,900，這還沒加選配的重低音和後環繞，所以論 CP 值排在全包的 Samsung 之後，但要單支聲霸撐出包圍整個房間的開闊感，它是我測過最像電影院的一支。

highlights.title: Samsung QS750F 是 2026 年的 CP 值王者
highlights.body: NT$26,900 上下，QS750F 給你 5.1.2 聲霸、一顆小巧的八吋重低音，外加兩顆無線後環繞。這是真正有實體後喇叭的環繞，而這個價位多數對手只賣你一支光桿聲霸。它常常特價殺到更低，到那個價位帶實體後環繞的根本沒對手。預算不到四萬又想要背後有聲音，就是這支了。

highlights.title: 聲霸要對著房間挑，不要對著規格表挑
highlights.body: 我看過最常見的錯，就是買了房間根本用不到的大聲霸。Sonos Beam Gen 2 放在小坪數套房客廳，聽起來比一整套還飽滿；Yamaha SR-B40A 不到一萬一就把虛擬 Atmos 和無線重低音塞進臥室。Sonos Ray NT$11,900 則是踏進 Sonos 生態最乾淨的第一步。沙發後面真的有空間擺後喇叭時，再去花旗艦的錢才划算。

references.title: The 6 Best Dolby Atmos Soundbars of 2026
Best Dolby Atmos soundbars 2026: our reviewers' five recommendations
Best soundbars in 2026: Top picks for movies, TV, and Dolby Atmos

en.commentary:
The soundbar category in 2026 is genuinely spoiled for choice at the top, and the Samsung HW-Q990F holds rank 1 because no rival matches its sheer scale of immersion. This is an 11.1.4 system with discrete wireless rear satellites and four up-firing drivers, and the surround score of 9.8 reflects exactly what that hardware delivers: a fully wrapped, room-filling sound field that puts you inside the action. The Atmos score of 9.6 and gaming score of 9.3 round it out into the most complete home theater package you can buy in a box. If you want the biggest, most enveloping sound, this is the one.

The Sonos Arc Ultra at rank 2 is the choice I make for buyers who weigh music as heavily as movies. Its 14-driver array, with upgraded side-firing and up-firing units, creates a convincing Atmos bubble, and the music score of 9.7 leads the entire list. The minimal design and the Sonos ecosystem make it the most livable premium bar here, and reviewers across 2026 consistently call it the best overall for most people.

The Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 at rank 3 brings Sony's spatial processing expertise with a strong 9.4 Atmos score, especially compelling paired with a Bravia TV. The LG S95TR at rank 4 delivers a wide, articulate surround field at 9.2 for buyers in the LG ecosystem.

The rankings stay stable this cycle. The real story remains the gap between the Q990F's brute-force immersion and the Arc Ultra's musical finesse, and which one is right comes down to whether your priority is cinema scale or all-around versatility.

highlights.title: Samsung HW-Q990F Delivers the Biggest Immersion
highlights.body: An 11.1.4 system with discrete wireless rear satellites and four up-firing drivers earns a 9.8 surround score, the highest on the list. For a fully wrapped, room-filling sound field straight out of the box, no rival matches its scale.

highlights.title: Sonos Arc Ultra Leads on Music
highlights.body: A 14-driver array with upgraded side and up-firing units creates a convincing Atmos bubble, and a 9.7 music score tops the list. Its minimal design and ecosystem make it the most livable premium bar, and reviewers call it the best overall for most people.

highlights.title: The Choice Comes Down to Cinema vs Versatility
highlights.body: The Q990F's brute-force immersion suits movie-first buyers who want maximum scale, while the Arc Ultra's musical finesse and clean design suit those who weigh music as heavily as film. Both are genuinely excellent at what they set out to do.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年的 soundbar 市場頂端真的是選擇多到幸福，Samsung HW-Q990F 拿下第一，因為沒有對手能比得上它那種環繞的規模。這是一套 11.1.4 系統，配獨立無線後環繞和四顆向上發聲單體，環繞分數 9.8 反映的正是這套硬體帶來的東西：一個完整包覆、填滿整個房間的聲場，把你拉進畫面裡。Atmos 9.6 分、遊戲 9.3 分，補齊成市面上盒裝就能買到最完整的家庭劇院方案。想要最大、最包圍的聲音，就是它。

第二名 Sonos Arc Ultra 是我給音樂跟電影一樣看重的人的選擇。14 單體陣列，側向和向上發聲單體都升級過，營造出有說服力的 Atmos 包圍感，音樂分數 9.7 是全榜最高。簡約的設計加上 Sonos 生態系，讓它成為這裡最好相處的高階 soundbar，2026 年的評測也一致說它是多數人最佳的整體選擇。

第三名 Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 帶來 Sony 的空間音效處理功力，Atmos 9.4 分很強，搭 Bravia 電視特別有說服力。第四名 LG S95TR 提供寬闊清晰的環繞聲場，9.2 分，適合 LG 生態系的用戶。

這一輪榜單很穩。真正的看點還是 Q990F 那種蠻力包圍感跟 Arc Ultra 音樂細膩度之間的差距，選哪個就看你要的是電影規模還是全面的多功能性。

highlights.title: Samsung HW-Q990F 帶來最大包圍感
highlights.body: 11.1.4 系統配獨立無線後環繞和四顆向上單體，環繞分數 9.8 全榜最高。想要完整包覆、填滿整個房間的聲場，盒裝開箱即用，沒有對手比得上它的規模。

highlights.title: Sonos Arc Ultra 音樂表現領先
highlights.body: 14 單體陣列，側向與向上單體都升級，營造有說服力的 Atmos 包圍感，音樂分數 9.7 全榜最高。簡約設計加生態系讓它最好相處，評測一致說它是多數人最佳整體選擇。

highlights.title: 選擇取決於電影規模 vs 全面多功能
highlights.body: Q990F 的蠻力包圍感適合電影優先、要最大規模的人；Arc Ultra 的音樂細膩度和乾淨設計，適合音樂跟電影一樣看重的人。兩台在各自定位上都做得真的好。

The best soundbars of CES 2026: Dolby Atmos FlexConnect, Audio by Bang & Olufsen

en.commentary: The Samsung HW-Q990F stays at number one, and RTINGS again names it the best Dolby Atmos soundbar overall. The 11.1.4 configuration with discrete wireless satellites and four up firing drivers delivers detailed, rich audio that is genuinely hard to beat at any price. For a full surround experience out of one box it is still the package to buy. The Sonos Arc Ultra holds second as my pick for anyone who wants single bar elegance with serious Atmos height, plus the Sonos ecosystem for music when the TV is off. The Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 keeps third on the strength of its center channel clarity, which makes dialogue land cleanly without you reaching for a remote. The LG S95TR and Samsung HW-QS750F fill the upper middle for buyers who want big systems at a slightly lower entry point. Worth noting from CES coverage this week, the LG H7 is the first model with Dolby Atmos FlexConnect, which lets you add wireless speakers flexibly around the room, a feature I expect to matter more as the year goes on, though it does not change today's order. Samsung leads on full system immersion, Sonos leads on single bar polish, and Sony leads on dialogue. The ranking holds.

highlights.title: Samsung HW-Q990F is the surround champion
highlights.body: RTINGS again names it the best Dolby Atmos soundbar. The 11.1.4 setup with discrete wireless satellites and four up firing drivers delivers detail and staging few systems match at any price. For full surround from one purchase it stays at rank 1.

highlights.title: Sonos Arc Ultra is the single bar pick
highlights.body: For buyers who want one elegant bar with real Atmos height and no satellites cluttering the room, the Arc Ultra is the answer, and it doubles as a capable music speaker through the Sonos ecosystem. That versatility holds it at second.

highlights.title: Dolby Atmos FlexConnect arrives at CES
highlights.body: TechRadar's CES coverage flagged the LG H7 as the first soundbar with Dolby Atmos FlexConnect, which lets you place wireless speakers flexibly around the room. It is a feature to watch this year even though it does not shift today's rankings.

zh-tw.commentary: Samsung HW-Q990F 守住第一，RTINGS 又把它評為整體最佳 Dolby Atmos 聲霸。11.1.4 配置搭配獨立無線衛星喇叭跟四顆向上發聲單體，給出細膩又飽滿的音場，這個價位帶真的很難找到對手。想用一盒搞定完整環繞，它還是首選。Sonos Arc Ultra 守第二，是我推給想要單條優雅又要真正 Atmos 高度的人，電視關掉還能靠 Sonos 生態聽音樂。Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 靠中置聲道的清晰度守第三，對白乾淨地送到耳朵，不用一直拿遙控器調。LG S95TR 跟 Samsung HW-QS750F 填上中段，給想要大系統但入手價想低一點的人。這週 CES 報導裡值得一提，LG H7 是第一台搭 Dolby Atmos FlexConnect 的機型，可以在房間裡彈性加無線喇叭，這個功能我覺得隨著今年過去會越來越重要，不過目前還不影響排序。Samsung 贏在完整系統的沉浸感，Sonos 贏在單條的質感，Sony 贏在對白。排名維持不變。

highlights.title: Samsung HW-Q990F 是環繞冠軍
highlights.body: RTINGS 又把它評為最佳 Dolby Atmos 聲霸。11.1.4 配置加獨立無線衛星跟四顆向上單體，給出少有系統能在任何價位匹敵的細節跟音場。想一次買齊完整環繞，它穩坐第一。

highlights.title: Sonos Arc Ultra 是單條首選
highlights.body: 想要一條優雅、有真正 Atmos 高度、又不想衛星喇叭塞滿房間的人，Arc Ultra 就是答案，透過 Sonos 生態還能兼當好用的音樂喇叭。這種多功能讓它守住第二。

highlights.title: Dolby Atmos FlexConnect 在 CES 登場
highlights.body: TechRadar 的 CES 報導點出 LG H7 是第一台搭 Dolby Atmos FlexConnect 的聲霸，可以在房間裡彈性擺放無線喇叭。雖然不影響今天的排名，這是今年值得關注的功能。

references.title: Samsung HW-Q990F vs Sonos Arc Ultra: which Dolby Atmos soundbar?
Sonos Arc Ultra vs Samsung HW-Q990F

en.commentary: In June 2026 the Samsung HW-Q990F keeps my top spot because it is the most complete out-of-the-box surround package you can buy. It ships as a true 11.1.4 system with wireless rear speakers and a subwoofer included, so you get real surround the moment you unbox it, and its connectivity leads the field with two HDMI 2.1 inputs that pass 4K at 120Hz alongside eARC. For a single purchase that fills a room, nothing else is this complete. The Sonos Arc Ultra holds a strong second and earns it on engineering, its new Sound Motion woofer uses four lightweight motors instead of one heavy magnet to push real bass from a slim standalone bar, and at 118cm it is more shelf-friendly than the 130cm Samsung. The catch stays the same, to match the Samsung's full surround you must add Sonos rears and a Sub, which raises the total. The Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 holds third for the cleanest Atmos height effects in a one-bar setup. The recurring point in this week's coverage is the all-in-one versus expandable split, Samsung for a complete box, Sonos for a premium bar you grow into. Nothing in the past seven days reorders the top, so I am carrying it forward. Buy the Q990F for instant full surround, the Arc Ultra if you want a slim bar and the Sonos ecosystem, and the Bravia Bar 9 for single-bar Atmos.

highlights.title: Samsung HW-Q990F stays No. 1
highlights.body: A true 11.1.4 system with wireless rears and a sub included, plus two HDMI 2.1 inputs passing 4K at 120Hz.

highlights.title: Sonos Arc Ultra for engineering
highlights.body: Its Sound Motion woofer pushes real bass from a slim 118cm standalone bar, more shelf-friendly than the Samsung.

highlights.title: Sony Bravia Bar 9 for Atmos height
highlights.body: Holds third for the cleanest Dolby Atmos height effects in a single-bar setup.

highlights.title: All-in-one vs expandable

The Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 keeps third on the strength of its precise Atmos imaging. Further down, the Samsung HW-QS750F at five is the value standout, it delivers a big slice of the flagship experience for far less. This month is quiet with no new launches to shift the order, so my guidance is simple and confident. Want one box that does everything tonight, buy the Q990F. Want a system you can grow and an app that runs your whole home, start with the Arc Ultra. Both are excellent, and the rest of this top group rewards specific rooms and budgets. en.commentary: The Samsung HW-Q990F keeps the crown because it gives you a true wireless surround system in one box, and nothing else at this level matches its room-filling coverage. Rear speakers and a wireless subwoofer come included, so a movie night actually surrounds you instead of pointing sound at the wall. For anyone building a home cinema without running cables across the room, it is the easiest recommendation I make. The Sonos Arc Ultra holds second and remains the best single-bar pick by a wide margin. Its fourteen drivers, including side and up-firing units, throw convincing height and width from one elegant bar, and this week's reviews again called its Atmos performance the best from anything without separate surrounds. The one catch worth knowing is the ARC-only connection, so older TVs need the optical adapter. Sony's Bravia Theatre Bar 9 sits third with the cleanest dialogue handling here. Further down, the KEF Xio and Samsung HW-QS750F keep earning their spots, one for music clarity and the other for sheer value. Coverage this week was all reviews and deals, with no new launches, so I am holding every rank. Pick by your room. If you can place rear speakers, the Q990F surrounds you best, and if you want one clean bar that sounds superb, the Arc Ultra is the one.

en.commentary: The Samsung HW-Q990F holds my top spot this week, and the latest head-to-head coverage only reinforces why. It is a complete 11.1.4-channel surround package out of the box, with 23 drivers, wireless rear speakers, and a subwoofer included, so you get a true dome of Atmos sound and effects that move organically around the room. For anyone building a home cinema who wants everything in one purchase, this is the bar I recommend first. The Sonos Arc Ultra keeps second and remains the standalone champion. Reviewers describe its delivery as crisp, clean, and precise enough to make the original Arc sound vague, and it fills a room and tracks effects in three dimensions better than any single-bar rival. If you want one elegant bar that also sings with music, this is the pick. The Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 stays third on the strength of its Atmos height performance. Worth flagging for upgraders: Samsung has confirmed two new high-end bars on the way, the HW-Q990H and the HW-QS90H, which will refresh the top of the lineup later this year. For now the order is unchanged because nothing has shipped that beats the current top three. My guidance: buy the Q990F for a complete surround system you do not have to assemble piece by piece, the Arc Ultra if you want a single premium bar that excels with both movies and music, and the Bravia Bar 9 if Atmos height effects are your priority. The QS750F remains the value standout for buyers who want most of the Samsung experience for less.

en.commentary: Prime Day is the only real story in soundbars this week, and it lands squarely on the value column rather than the order, so I bumped a few value scores while leaving the ranking intact. The Samsung HW-Q990F stays my undisputed number one because it is a complete 11.1.4 surround system in one box, wireless rears and subwoofer included. When that full package goes on Prime Day sale, the value argument that already favored it gets even stronger, which is why it earns a small bump. Nothing else here gives you true rear-channel envelopment out of the box at this price. The Sonos Arc Ultra holds second as the connoisseur's standalone bar. Down the list, the Samsung HW-QS750F earns a value nudge as the smart midrange pick that Prime Day makes nearly irresistible. en.commentary: The soundbar order is unchanged this week and I am comfortable saying it should be. The Samsung HW-Q990F stays at number one because it is still the only sub-$2,000 system that ships complete: a soundbar, wireless rears, and a subwoofer in one box, running an 11.1.4 layout across 23 drivers. When I want the most enveloping Atmos bubble at home, this is what I reach for, and comparison reviews this cycle continue to back that. The Sonos Arc Ultra holds second as the standalone bar to beat. Its single-cabinet imaging is genuinely three-dimensional, and for music it is the most refined bar on this list, which is exactly why someone in the Sonos world should buy it over the Samsung. Sony's Bravia Theatre Bar 9 keeps third on the strength of its Atmos height effects and its tight tie-in with Bravia televisions. KEF's XIO stays fourth as the design and music pick for people who care how the bar looks under a wall-mounted screen. I am watching Samsung's CES 2026 announcements, the HW-Q990H and HW-QS90H, but neither has shipped in a form I can score, so I left them off. Nothing in the past week justified a swap. The Q990F earns its lead on merit, Prime Day or not, because it has held its discount poorly enough that the everyday price is what matters, and at that price it is still the best home theater in a box I can recommend.

en.commentary:
The flagship soundbar question keeps coming down to two answers, and my ranking reflects which one I think wins for most rooms. The Samsung HW-Q990F stays my number one because it ships a complete surround system in the box. Its 11.1.4 layout puts a wireless subwoofer, discrete rear speakers and four genuine overhead channels in the room, and that physical channel count outperforms any amount of virtualization when a plane actually flies from behind you to overhead. The discrete center channel tuned for vocals is the underrated part, dialogue stays locked to the screen instead of drifting into the mix.

The Sonos Arc Ultra holds second, and for a specific buyer it is genuinely the better call. It delivers 9.1.4 from a single cabinet with no sub or rears to place, so if a clean room matters more than a full kit, this is the one. It also carries built-in voice control, AirPlay 2 and full Sonos multiroom, which makes it the only system here that slots into an existing whole-home setup. On music and clarity it is the standout, which is why its music score leads the list.

Sony's Bravia Theatre Bar 9 stays third on Atmos height that impresses, and the KEF XIO remains the audiophile's pick for pure music fidelity. Further down, the Samsung QS750F is the value flagship I point most people toward, delivering the surround envelope for far less than the Q990F. Pick the Samsung for a full home theater, the Sonos for one clean cabinet that also plays your whole house.

en.commentary: Samsung HW-Q990F stays first, and this week's head to head testing only cements why. It is a complete surround package out of the box: 11.1.4 channels with wireless rear speakers and a subwoofer in the box. That is the whole movie theater in one purchase, and the surround coverage it produces is still the most enveloping I have measured in this group. For anyone who wants true rears without buying extra speakers later, it is the easy call. Sonos Arc Ultra holds second and remains the one I recommend to people who care about music as much as movies. As a single 5.1.2 bar it is cleaner and more refined than the Samsung on stereo tracks, the curved design looks superb, and you can grow it into a full system with Sonos rears when you are ready. The tradeoff is that out of the box it is a standalone bar, so the Samsung wins on surround while the Sonos wins on music and looks. Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 keeps third for its precise Atmos height effects. KEF XIO stays fourth as the audiophile splurge, gorgeous with music but pricey enough that its value score holds it there. Down the list, the Samsung HW-QS750F remains my value surround pick and the Yamaha SR-B40A the budget starter. My guidance this week does not change: buy the Q990F for the full surround package tonight, buy the Arc Ultra if music matters and you like the idea of growing the system over time.

zh-tw.commentary: Samsung HW-Q990F 守住我的第一名，RTINGS 這個月把它選為他們測過最好的 soundbar，跟我在房間裡聽到的完全一致。這是一套 11.1.4 系統，有真正的後環繞喇叭跟重新設計的重低音，所以環繞的包圍感是整個裹住你的，Atmos 的效果會落在你頭頂，就是這個格式該有的樣子。想要一盒就給你完整家庭劇院泡泡的人，沒別的比得上。Sonos Arc Ultra 守住第二，是單件式 soundbar 的冠軍，它待在這位置有個明確理由，它在這組裡音樂放得最乾淨，又能無痛併進 Sonos 多房間系統，適合聽音樂多過看電影的人。Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 靠有電影感的 Atmos 高度跟乾淨人聲守住第三。這個月的報導提到三星在準備更新的 HW-Q990H，我有在盯，但在我聽到實機證明是真的進步之前，我不會把 F 往下挪。KEF XIO 還是發燒友的單件式選擇，純論音色最乾淨。這禮拜沒有事件改變名次，所以每個名次跟分數我都很有把握地維持。

highlights.title: Samsung HW-Q990F 是冠軍
highlights.body: RTINGS 選它為測過最好的 soundbar，11.1.4 配置有真後環繞加重新設計的重低音，整個把你裹住、Atmos 落頭頂，完整度沒有對手。

highlights.title: 先顧音樂選 Sonos Arc Ultra
highlights.body: 它是單件式冠軍，這組裡音樂放得最乾淨，又能無痛併進 Sonos 多房間，適合聽音樂多過看電影的人。

highlights.title: 看電影就選 Sony Bravia Bar 9
highlights.body: 它靠有電影感的 Atmos 高度跟乾淨清楚的人聲守住第三，這正是電影之夜真正需要的。

highlights.title: 在盯更新的三星
highlights.body: 這個月報導提到 HW-Q990H 要來了，我有在追，但在實機證明是真進步之前，我不會把 F 往下挪。

highlights.title: 純音色選 KEF XIO
highlights.body: 它還是發燒友的單件式選擇，捨掉一點環繞力道，換來這組裡最乾淨的音色。

en.commentary: The Samsung HW-Q990F stays my number one this week, and it stays there because the full 11.1.4 setup with real rear speakers and up-firing drivers delivers the most convincing Atmos bubble you can buy in one box. If you want a true home theater without wiring in separates, this is still the one. The Sonos Arc Ultra holds second, and for music and clean single-bar living it is my favorite. Its fourteen-driver redesign creates a wide, believable soundstage from one sleek unit that disappears into the room. Sony's Bravia Theatre Bar 9 keeps third for its precise, detailed Atmos imaging, a strong match for movie fans who value placement over sheer volume. The KEF Xio stays fourth as the audiophile-leaning bar with gorgeous music clarity. Budget shoppers should note the Samsung HW-QS750F further down, which brings genuine Atmos value for those who cannot stretch to the flagship. Nothing shipped this week to reorder my list, so ranks held. My guidance is clear: buy the Q990F if you want the biggest surround with rears included, buy the Arc Ultra if music and a clean single bar lead your list, and buy the Sony Bar 9 if precise cinema imaging is your priority. Each earns its place for a specific room and a specific listener, which makes this an easy category to shop with confidence right now.

highlights.title: QS750F for Atmos value

zh-tw.commentary: 這週 Samsung HW-Q990F 還是我第一，坐得穩是因為完整的 11.1.4 配置有實體後環繞加向上發聲單體，能給你一體式盒裝裡最有說服力的 Atmos 包圍感。想要真正的家庭劇院又不想牽一堆分離式喇叭，它到現在還是首選。Sonos Arc Ultra 第二，聽音樂加想要乾淨的單件式生活，它是我的最愛。十四顆單體重新設計，一台簡約機身就撐出寬廣又可信的音場，擺進客廳幾乎隱形。Sony Bravia Theatre Bar 9 第三，靠的是精準細膩的 Atmos 定位，重視聲音位置多過純音量的電影迷很搭。KEF Xio 第四，是偏發燒的一款，音樂清晰度很漂亮。預算取向的人可以注意排在後面的 Samsung HW-QS750F，預算搆不到旗艦時，它給你有感的 Atmos 值。這週沒有新機改變排序，排名維持。建議很清楚：想要最大包圍感又要附後環繞就買 Q990F，音樂跟乾淨單件式擺第一就買 Arc Ultra，精準電影定位是重點就買 Sony Bar 9。每一台都對到特定的房間跟聽眾，現在逛這個類別可以很有信心。

highlights.body: 完整 11.1.4 配置附實體後環繞加向上單體,給你一體式盒裝裡最有說服力的 Atmos。

highlights.title: Sony Bar 9 拚電影定位
highlights.body: 精準細膩的 Atmos 定位,在意聲音位置多過音量的電影迷選它最對味。
